title: Cobalt of Imagination
description: Push and pull blocks with redstone. Cobalt Imagination comes with a whole variety of blocks and items.
body:
# About
Push and pull blocks with redstone. Cobalt Imagination comes with a whole variety of blocks and items, use a magnet to push and pull blocks, listen to new music, gear up in new armor, and light up the path with new lights. This mod has many new features, and things to discover!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hCExZJDBzys" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Cobalt](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/mod/2025/397/19063951-cobalt-banner_l.jpg)

# Download:
You can also download this mod from [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/cobalt-imagination) or [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/106721/cobalt-imagination)

# How to Use:
## Structures:
You may come across some new structures in your world, like a old abandoned cobalt tower! This anchient tower holds cobalt, from the anchient redstoners. You can usualy find a music disc in the chest.

## Cobalt Magnet:
Cobalt Imagination is made for mostly redstoners, has magnets to pull blocks of cobalt to them. They can be crafted like this:

![Crafted Cobalt Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14cb7b422b04b3d472afbd5dd183bd90bf85628d.png)

The magnets can pull up to 5 blocks. To use the magnet, you will have to get some redstone as it is made to be used with redstone.

## Block of Cobalt:
How to make the block of cobalt? Try this:

![Crafted Block of Cobalt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e141091831165b621c3195d6246d115e5185a57c.png)
